claims.text: Huge needs for new capacity driven by explosion in Chinese demand since 2000
claims.snippet: Huge needs for new capacity driven by explosion in Chinese demand since 2000

claims.text: Nickel shortage up to 2006/07 led to three responses
claims.snippet: Nickel shortage up to 2006/07 led to three responses

claims.text: Growth in 200-series stainless steel (1-2% Ni) as a substitute for 300-series (8-9% Ni)
claims.snippet: Growth in 200-series stainless steel (1-2% Ni) as a substitute for 300-series (8-9% Ni)

claims.text: Processing of low-grade laterite nickel ores into nickel pig iron in China
claims.snippet: Processing of low-grade laterite nickel ores into nickel pig iron in China

claims.text: $30bn+ spent by non-Chinese industry to expand production (including New Caledonia)
claims.snippet: $30bn+ spent by non-Chinese industry to expand production (including New Caledonia)

claims.text: In the face of declining sulphide reserves, solution to growth was mainly from using low‑grade laterites (limonites) by pressure acid leach processes (PAL) or from higher‑grade laterites (saprolites) using conventional ferronickel smelting.
claims.snippet: In the face of declining sulphide reserves, solution to growth was mainly from using low‑grade laterites (limonites) by pressure acid leach processes (PAL) or from higher‑grade laterites (saprolites) using conventional ferronickel smelting.

claims.text: Soaring capex and major technical challenges have made this 'solution' economically unviable in the eyes of the industry.
claims.snippet: Soaring capex and major technical challenges have made this 'solution' economically unviable in the eyes of the industry.

claims.text: The 'new' solution has been the development of low‑capex/high opex nickel pig iron (NPI) in China.
claims.snippet: The 'new' solution has been the development of low‑capex/high opex nickel pig iron (NPI) in China.

claims.text: World Ex‑China has not recovered from 2008 global financial crisis
claims.snippet: World Ex‑China has not recovered from 2008 global financial crisis

claims.text: Stainless steel production by region ('000t SS) World increased 27% from 2007 to 2012
The short term - still awful with more cuts needed - LME stocks up 51kt in 2012 and 46kt in 2013 YTD
claims.snippet: LME stocks up 51kt in 2012 and 46kt in 2013 YTD

claims.text: New Caledonia has not participated in the laterite ore surge
claims.snippet: New Caledonia has not participated in the laterite ore surge

claims.text: Mine production overstates the actual impact due to massive ore stocking in China and also >50% of ore from Philippines not being used as nickel, but iron ore
claims.snippet: Mine production overstates the actual impact due to massive ore stocking in China and also >50% of ore from Philippines not being used as nickel, but iron ore

claims.text: Much of major sulphide mine investment over past 20 years ... was essentially defensive, to offset falling reserves elsewhere.
claims.snippet: Much of major sulphide mine investment over past 20 years ... was essentially defensive, to offset falling reserves elsewhere.

claims.text: Growth in laterites has come mainly from conventional ferronickel, high‑pressure acid leach and Chinese nickel pig iron.
claims.snippet: Growth in laterites has come mainly from conventional ferronickel, high‑pressure acid leach and Chinese nickel pig iron.

claims.text: Still further scope for growth in Indonesia, Korea and China (latter two with help of New Caledonian ore?)
claims.snippet: Still further scope for growth in Indonesia, Korea and China (latter two with help of New Caledonian ore?)

claims.text: Projects running many years late, capex mostly rose 2-4 times above original estimates and commissioning problems have been major
claims.snippet: Projects running many years late, capex mostly rose 2-4 times above original estimates and commissioning problems have been major

claims.text: the PAL projects will range from $8,000-15,000/t with an average of $12-13,000/t while the ferronickel projects range from $8,500-13,000/t with an average of $10,000/t
claims.snippet: the PAL projects will range from $8,000-15,000/t with an average of $12-13,000/t while the ferronickel projects range from $8,500-13,000/t with an average of $10,000/t

claims.text: Opex estimates much higher than in feasibility
claims.snippet: Opex estimates much higher than in feasibility.

claims.text: Cash costs range from $12-20,000/tonne ($5.45-9/lb) depending on process and location
claims.snippet: Cash costs range from $12-20,000/tonne ($5.45-9/lb) depending on process and location.

claims.text: Costs do vary with nickel price so there is no single price below which supply shuts
claims.snippet: Costs do vary with nickel price so there is no single price below which supply shuts.

claims.text: Costs have fallen sharply (15-20%) since March 2012 (lower carbon and ore prices and new power rebates in Inner Mongolia)
claims.snippet: costs have fallen sharply (15-20%) since March 2012 (lower carbon and ore prices and new power rebates in Inner Mongolia).

claims.text: new plants have 30-50% less energy consumption and stainless mills get significant energy and iron credit benefits
claims.snippet: new plants have 30-50% less energy consumption and stainless mills get significant energy and iron credit benefits.

claims.text: Ore supplies from Philippines and Indonesia are critical in determining the future output limits
claims.snippet: Ore supplies from Philippines and Indonesia are critical in determining the future output limits.

claims.text: If new supply outside China comes on successfully, capping prices, NPI production will be limited - if new supply fails, there will be more NPI
claims.snippet: If new supply outside China comes on successfully, capping prices, NPI production will be limited - if new supply fails, there will be more NPI.

claims.text: OVER 400,000 tpa NEW capacity due, mostly Greenfield rotary kiln/electric arc furnace and integrated with stainless mills
claims.snippet: OVER 400,000 tpa NEW capacity due, mostly Greenfield rotary kiln/electric arc furnace and integrated with stainless mills.

claims.text: Costs will rise as energy prices rise and RMB appreciates but new plants have 30-50% less energy consumption
claims.snippet: Costs will rise as energy prices rise and RMB appreciates but new plants have 30-50% less energy consumption.

claims.text: Low Ni NPI blast furnace producers still profitable
claims.snippet: Low Ni NPI blast furnace producers still profitable.

claims.text: Cost of ore from Indonesia has plunged in 2013
claims.snippet: Cost of ore from Indonesia has plunged in 2013.

claims.text: Indonesian ore ban planned for end-2013. No-one thinks this will happen!
claims.snippet: Indonesian ore ban planned for end-2013. No-one thinks this will happen!

claims.text: breakeven for NPI could rise from $12,000‑17,000/t currently to $19,000‑25,000/lb over next 4‑5 years as ore costs, electricity costs rise and RMB appreciates?
claims.snippet: breakeven for NPI could rise from $12,00017,000/t currently to $19,000-25,000/lb over next 4-5 years as ore costs, electricity costs rise and RMB appreciates?

claims.text: new capacity needs prices significantly above $22,000/t ($10/lb)
claims.snippet: new capacity needs prices significantly above $22,000/t ($10/lb)

claims.text: We don't think ore supply from Indonesia to China will stop in 2014 - it will become (a lot) more expensive and there will probably be some NPI capacity built in Indonesia from 2015 onwards.
claims.snippet: We don't think ore supply from Indonesia to China will stop in 2014 - it will become (a lot) more expensive and there will probably be some NPI capacity built in Indonesia from 2015 onwards.

claims.text: next two years will be challenging for the nickel industry - unless the Indonesians ban ore exports in 2014
claims.snippet: Next two years will be challenging for the nickel industry - unless the Indonesians ban ore exports in 2014
